nodes.label: Wall Ball Rep State Machine
nodes.rationale: Five-phase state machine (IDLE→SQUATTING→THROWING→BALL_AT_TARGET→CATCHING) avoids single-frame false positives. Timeout fallbacks were added because the CATCHING state had no exit path when ball is caught above the shoulder joint, causing the machine to hang indefinitely after the first 1-2 reps.

nodes.label: Three-Stage Target Detection Strategy
nodes.rationale: Stage 1 (ball trajectory pre-scan, 8th percentile of Y values) is primary as rig bars and ceiling edges corrupt HoughLines-based Stage 2. Stage 3 dynamic recalibration corrects Stage 2 mistakes after 3 throws are observed.

nodes.label: Confidence Buffer (15-frame movement classification)
nodes.rationale: 15-frame buffer with 60% confidence threshold and 20 stable frames to switch prevents flickering between movement classifications in real-time video analysis.

hyperedges.label: Three-Stage Target Detection (pre-scan, image-based, dynamic recalibration)
